courses.title: CMSC 127 — Database Systems
courses.description: Projects focused on database design, CRUD systems, information management, and data-backed applications.

projects.title: Library Management System
projects.description: A database-backed web application for managing books, borrowers, inventory, and circulation transactions.

projects.title: Student Enrollment System
projects.description: A prototype enrollment platform for managing student records, course schedules, subject offerings, and enrollment transactions.

courses.title: CMSC 141 — Automata and Language Theory
courses.description: Projects involving formal languages, automata simulations, parsers, and computational models.

projects.title: DFA Simulator
projects.description: An educational simulator for deterministic finite automata that allows users to create states, define transitions, and test input strings.

courses.title: CMSC 191 — Special Topics in Computer Science
courses.description: Projects involving machine learning, data science, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, and applied computing.

projects.title: Flood Prediction Prototype
projects.description: A machine learning prototype for predicting flood risk levels using environmental and historical weather datasets.

courses.title: Capstone and Research Projects
courses.description: Larger student outputs involving software engineering, applied research, community-oriented systems, and Computer Science solutions.

projects.title: Smart Farming System
projects.description: An IoT-enabled agriculture monitoring system that tracks environmental conditions and assists in crop management.
